generated_oml:
namespace base = "http://example.org/base"
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://example.org/DTDFVocab"
instance LabScaleGantryCrane : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical crane structure and controller operating in the research laboratory"
]
instance ResearchLabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Research laboratory environment where the lab-scale gantry crane system operates",
    base:contains LabScaleGantryCrane
]
instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Python program interface transmitting crane state data from physical crane to MQTT broker"
]
instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalCraneInterface
]
instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time state data of the lab-scale gantry crane including position, velocity, and control signals",
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]
instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol broker facilitating real-time data transmission between physical crane and digital twin components"
]
instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for persistent storage of crane state data with continuous logging"
]
instance C4ModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for architectural visualization using C4 Model context and container diagrams"
]
instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub repository for version control of digital twin components and models"
]
instance VirtualMachineContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization using virtual machines for system dissemination"
]
instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 Model for architectural visualization using context and container diagrams to structure software components of the lab-scale gantry crane digital twin",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo C4ModelingEnabler, GitHubRepository
]
instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing optimal control strategies for lab-scale gantry crane operations based on real-time data analysis",
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlAction
]
instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for logging and tracking historical crane performance data for system analysis",
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]
instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling real-time monitoring and visualization of crane state data",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]
instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for continuous validation of digital twin against physical crane behavior",
    DTDFVocab:provides ContinuousValidationInsight
]
instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service detecting faults in crane operations through anomaly detection mechanisms",
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]
instance VersionControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for managing version control of digital twin components using GitHub repositories",
    DTDFVocab:provides VersionControlInsight
]
instance DeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for system dissemination using containerized virtual machines",
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemDeploymentInsight
]
instance AdHocTwinningApproach : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ad-hoc approach for digital twin engineering in lab-scale gantry crane system"
]
instance OptimalControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of crane control parameters for optimal operation",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane state for monitoring operational status"
]
instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of historical performance data for system evaluation"
]
instance ContinuousValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous comparison between digital twin and physical crane behavior for validation"
]
instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection and alerting of anomalies or faults in crane operations"
]
instance VersionControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Tracking and managing versions of digital twin components via GitHub"
]
instance SystemDeploymentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dissemination of digital twin system using containerized virtual machines"
]
CraneStateData DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker, TimescaleDB, GitHubRepository
MQTTBroker DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, RealTimeVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
TimescaleDB DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, FaultDetectionService, ContinuousValidationService
C4ModelingEnabler DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
GitHubRepository DTDFVocab:enables VersionControlService
VirtualMachineContainerization DTDFVocab:enables DeploymentService
AdHocTwinningApproach DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands, such as trajectory instructions generated by the Trajectory Generator Service, are transmitted from the Control Application to the Physical Crane Interface via MQTT protocol for execution on the physical crane. Specific command types, message formats, validation and authentication mechanisms, feedback systems, conflict resolution, and command execution confirmation details are not provided in the document."
]

    base:desc "The system architecture is visualized using the C4 Model, with ActiveMQ message broker for inter-component communication, InfluxDB for time-series data storage, and virtualization technologies for deployment. ]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Services communicate using MQTT protocol in a publish-subscribe topology through an MQTT Broker for inter-service signaling. Bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
